description: SLS(25) -- Claude perceptual audit. Built on YOUR SLS(24). ONE surgical change to ClassifyBarToRegime_Core, empirically derived from independent reconstruction of 65k real EURUSD M5 bars: the Hurst-first veto (trendRegimesAllowed) was noise-dominated at M5 -- it suppressed trend classification on ~33k genuinely-trending bars (verified: 29% trend recognition). Replaced with MA-fan consensus: macro EMA200 displacement(>=0.8 ATR) AND 20-bar slope(>=0.3 ATR) NECESSARY, faster voices (H4/DI/swing-DNA/EMA21-angle/Hurst) CONFIRM. Result on 65k bars: trend recognition 29%->89%, false-trend-in-chop 11%->0%. New globals: g_Ema200DistRing[20] ring buffer + g_Ema200DistHist20. Structural parity verified (brace delta 0, paren delta identical to base). COMPILE-VERIFY ONLY; report errors, fix minimally, report exact changes.
